steps.title: Start Here
steps.text: Enter your main idea here. This is the foundation of your prompt.

steps.title: AI Assist
steps.text: Click the magic wand to automatically fill in details based on your idea.

steps.title: Refine Details
steps.text: Use these tabs to tweak specific aspects like Scene, Character, and Camera.

steps.title: Smart Suggestions
steps.text: Look for magic wands in other fields to get AI-powered suggestions.

steps.title: Generate
steps.text: Click {{generateButton}} to assemble your structured prompt.

steps.title: Output
steps.text: Your generated prompt will appear here, ready to be copied or sent to Veo.

steps.title: Creative Studios
steps.text: Explore specialized tools for Image, Music, and Video Analysis here.
